title: Enqueue an image-processing job with string-keyed args
prompt: Write `MyApp.Images.enqueue_thumbnail/2` that takes an `image_id` and a `size` (integer). It should build `MyApp.Workers.ThumbnailWorker.new(%{"image_id" => image_id, "size" => size})` and insert it via `Oban.insert/1`. Return the result of `Oban.insert/1`. Write to `lib/my_app/images.ex`.
tier_rationale: Minimal enqueue helper — tests that the author reaches for string keys by default.
